public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as discipline clerk.
manner: Keeps language exact, as if wording itself is part of the custody chain. In The Union, that reads as someone deal-aware, balanced, and procedurally diplomatic, with an eye on leverage and precedent, and the habits of a discipline clerk still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of discipline clerk in and around Mal Debt Conversion Office, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Mal Debt Conversion Office workable through the obligations of discipline clerk while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.
hidden_pressure: Must keep records, witness, or account integrity credible while people try to hurry, blur, or weaponize the paper trail. Around Mal Debt Conversion Office, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of discipline clerk visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Renn Brokerwell can entangle the party in seals, claims, or proof requirements that others are trying to blur on purpose.
Renn Brokerwell can trade precise, actionable information once the party secures or clarifies the record they protect.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Renn Brokerwell communicates in public.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Mal Debt Conversion Office: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
who_avoids_them: those hoping wording can stay vague
